flashcards.definition: A circular graph divided into slices that represent the proportion or percentage each category contributes to the whole.
The angle of a pie-chart slice, calculated as the category's relative frequency multiplied by 360°.
The proportion of the total represented by each category, equal to the frequency divided by the total count.
The concept that all slices of a pie chart must sum to 100% of the data.
A pie chart with three-dimensional perspective that can distort the perceived sizes of slices; generally not recommended.
